cmoncol:rancher.job.desc: The Rancher harvests passive resources like Wool and Milk from Pokémon stored in the Pasture.
cmoncol:attendant.job.desc: The Attendant trains and breeds Pokémon in the Daycare in exchange for currency.
cmoncol:ev_trainer.job.desc: The EV Trainer targets specific stats and hyper-trains Pokémon in the Trainer Academy.
cmoncol:harvester.job.desc: The Harvester harvests fully grown Apricorn trees around their plantation without destroying the crop.
cmoncol:pokeball_workshop.job.desc: The Pokéball Crafter turns apricorns and materials into Pokéballs. Learns better recipes as the building levels up.
cmoncol:science_lab.job.desc: The Scientist processes Sand and Gravel to find Fossils and rare loot.
cmoncol:nurse.job.desc: The Nurse heals nearby players and their Pokémon, and calls upon a companion Pokémon to assist them.
cmoncol:pokemon_guard.job.desc: The Pokémon Guard patrols the colony alongside their trusty companion to fend off monster raids.
cmoncol:gym.job.desc: The Gym Leader waits for challengers. Defeat them to earn a prestigious Gym Badge!
cmoncol:rancher.skills.desc: Benefits from high Stamina and Agility to harvest resources faster.
cmoncol:attendant.skills.desc: Benefits from high Mana and Knowledge to grant more XP per training cycle.
cmoncol:ev_trainer.skills.desc: Benefits from high Athletics and Strength to EV train faster.
cmoncol:harvester.skills.desc: Benefits from high Agility and Stamina to harvest faster.
cmoncol:pokeball_workshop.skills.desc: Benefits from high Intelligence and Agility to craft faster.
cmoncol:science_lab.skills.desc: Benefits from high Intelligence and Knowledge to process materials faster.
cmoncol:nurse.skills.desc: Benefits from high Intelligence and Adaptability to manage the Poké Center efficiently.
cmoncol:pokemon_guard.skills.desc: Benefits from high Athletics and Strength to better defend the town.
cmoncol:gym.skills.desc: Benefits from high Knowledge and Mana to strategize and battle effectively.
